name: a Google Cloud vision activates the gcp probe group
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "A data pipeline on Google Cloud with GKE and BigQuery" --classify 2>/dev/null); echo "$OUT" | ruby -rjson -e 'a=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["activated_probe_namespaces"]; exit(a.include?("gcp") ? 0:1)' && echo gcp-activated 1>&2
